title: Open Recipe Standard
$comment: Normative JSON Schema for the Open Recipe Standard: a portable, vendor-neutral format for encoding recipes for interchange between applications and libraries. Each ingredient is an object with a required name field. Measurements use quantity_kind and unit_system for unambiguous conversion. Ingredient amount fields are written for base_yield; scaling to other batch sizes is done by multiplying every ingredient amount (and comparing yields in the same quantity_kind/unit) by a scale factor. Provisional or vendor-specific fields use keys matching ^X-.

recipe_uuid.description: Stable identifier (e.g. vendor prefix + unique id) for this recipe instance.

base_yield.description: What the written ingredient amounts produce (e.g. 24 cookies, 6 servings). To scale: multiply each ingredient amount by (target_yield_amount / base_yield.amount) when both are in the same unit and quantity_kind, or by an explicit scale factor chosen by the user.

ingredients.description: Ingredients in order of use; repeat lines when used at different stages. Each amount is for base_yield unless scaled at display time.

oven_fan.description: Convection setting; if omitted, implementations may treat as Off.

oven_temp.description: Starting oven temperature; use quantity_kind temperature.

oven_time.description: Overall oven duration; use quantity_kind duration.

source_url.description: URL this recipe was taken from, if applicable.

source_authors.description: Original author(s) of the recipe, not the person who entered it.

QuantityKind.description: mass vs volume vs count; temperature/duration for oven fields. Volume (cup, tsp) is never mass.

UnitSystem.description: Disambiguates US cup vs metric cup, mass oz vs fl oz, etc.

Measurement.description: A quantity with explicit kind and system for safe conversion.

amount.description: Numeric amount in the given unit.

unit.description: Unit code (e.g. g, ml, cup, tsp, each, C, F, minutes).

IngredientSansSubstitutions.description: Ingredient line without nested substitutions (used inside substitutions arrays).

amount.description: Amount for base_yield; scale with the recipe when changing batch size.

processing.description: Tags like whole, minced, large dice.

usda_num.description: USDA Standard Reference index key for nutrition lookup.

Ingredient.description: Full ingredient line including optional substitutions.

substitutions.description: Same shape as an ingredient but without substitutions on nested items.

Haccp.description: HACCP annotation: either control_point or critical_control_point, not both.
